description: Engine initial=@cell hydration (§51.0, A-leg). <engine for=Phase initial=@seed> boots from the @seed cell (.Active) at construction time; @phase + its interpolation read Active. No input — the hydration shape.
rationale: §51.0 initial=@cell sets the engine's construction-time start state from a cell (not a transition). @seed = .Active -> the engine boots into Active and the interpolation reflects it.
